=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/leakingRequirements_genericTag.ts(14,27): suggestion TS377041: Methods of this Service require 'FileSystem' from every caller. This leaks implementation details — resolve these dependencies at Layer creation time. effect(leakingRequirements)


==== /.src/leakingRequirements_genericTag.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import type { Effect } from "effect"
    import { Context } from "effect"
    
    export class FileSystem extends Context.Tag("FileSystem")<FileSystem, {
      writeFile: (content: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
    }>() {}
    
    interface LeakingService {
      writeCache: () => Effect.Effect<void, never, FileSystem>
      readCache: Effect.Effect<void, never, FileSystem>
    }
    
    export const GenericTag = Context.GenericTag<LeakingService>("LeakingService")
                              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377041: Methods of this Service require 'FileSystem' from every caller. This leaks implementation details — resolve these dependencies at Layer creation time. effect(leakingRequirements)
